title: <div>Welcome to ENC1102. My name is Anthony Padavano, and I will be your instruc
content:
Welcome to ENC1102. My name is Anthony Padavano, and I will be your instructor.

There are a few things I’d like to review before you begin the class.

First and foremost, this is an online class (as I’m sure you know by now). This means we will never meet in-person. All of your work will be submitted online via Blackboard.

Second, there are 5 major assignments in the class (Writing assignments 1 through 5):
WA1 - Argumentative Essay (10%)
WA2 - Research Essay Proposal (5%)
WA3 - Research Essay Outline/Annotated Bibliography (10%)
WA4 - Research Essay Draft (15%)
WA5 - Research Essay Final (40%)

WA1 & 5 will be graded using the Grading Criteria (link).

The rest of your grade (20%) comes from smaller writing assignments, discussion questions, and peer reviews assigned to you throughout the semester.

Any work you submit will be graded--so please, take some pride in your work. What you write represents your thoughts; and who are you if not your thoughts? So think carefully, not carelessly! And write like you mean each and every word!
